programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe gets angry at Charlie and Floyd when he is left behind by the Cannonball He decides to start his own transport business by using the Flivverball an old car converted into a railway car Kate must now deal with the feuding groups before the cannonball goes out of business

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A jittery airline heir Brett Cullen finds himself on a flight to hell Meanwhile a stewardess Lezlie Deane goes home with a charming passenger Ted Demers who may be too good to be true

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: After the death penalty is abolished an executioner continues his former job through freelancing

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy woman makes the mistake of murdering her husband while an escaped mental patient dressed in a Santa Claus outfit is on the loose

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Cold ruthless Kay Mason runs a garment factory and treats her illegal Mexican immigrant workers in a cruel inhumane manner Kay meets her match in Victor a handsome mysterious young Mexican in whom Kay develops an amorous interest

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A flashy businessman finds out he owns a slum apartment building and is unwilling to make repairs until strange things begin to happen to him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: In a run down hotel in a town where a slasher has killed 7 people Eric checks in after inquiring about Skorzeny He meets several people staying at the hotel including a man in black who reveals that he is also werewolf born in 1468

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric teams up with an elderly homeless man who is also a werewolf in an effort to defeat Remy But discovers that the Gray Wolf hungers for human flesh

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When a doctor experimenting in near death experiences dies Nick secretly agrees to go under in an attempt to reconcile his own past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan and Micki investigate the apparent suicides of a handful of ballet dancers and soon learn that they may be linked to a rare music box

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is stymied over how to rescue a captured member of the underground until a potential diversion appears in the form of an old WWI buddy of Sgt Schultz

programme.title: Mchale 229
programme.desc: Mchale 229

programme.title: Mchale 236
programme.desc: Mchale 236

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: The Colonels daughter visits from her all-girls school and the Colonel asks Sgt Carter to find her an escort so of course Gomer Pyle is the perfect choice - at least until her overly protective mother panics

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carters platoon takes part in war games and Gomers naive ways cause more problems than Sgt Carter can handle Will Gomers actions get Carter the boot

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Japanese soldier arrives on the island thinks its still WWII and holds the castaways prisoner on their own island

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A bank robber comes to the island to hide from the authorities and holds the castaways prisoner while he waits for his boat after his cover is blown

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Little Luke worships his Grandpa Amos but when he gets in trouble at school for using Grandpas colorful language and telling lies the rest of the family tells Amos to set a better example for Little Luke Amos tries his best to change his ways but after a week he cant stand it anymore and reverts to his old habits When Little Lukes teacher brings him home from school after a serious incident Amos faces a hard choice continue to be his grandsons hero or admit that hes not perfect

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Real McCoys

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: After the death of the head CONTROL scientist Max finds that he wasnt the brains behind his discoveries

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max temporarily takes over for a king that looks exactly like him in a parody of The Prisoner of Zenda Ah yes I remember the well

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Bj hires the eyes of Texas girls to help find his missing sister

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: When Wilbur balks at buying a new car for Carol she hitches up a buggy to Mister Ed Ed then reports her to the SPCA

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany so he creates a health spa

programme.title: Mozambique 1964
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling kidnap and murder

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget must find a highly experimental missile stolen by Doctor Claw and stop him from using it to destroy Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Talon poses as a DJ to infiltrate HQs annual Missionball Ball and trap all the guests with his hypnotic speakers

programme.title: The Millionairess
programme.desc: A millionairess and a doctor cannot marry until they meet conditions set up by their respective parents

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: On the ice world of Ultima Thule the Alphans encounter members of lost earth expedition who have achieved immortality- but at a price!

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The FBI approaches Uncle Jesse to allow Boss to stay at the Duke farm since he is a key witness in an upcoming trial for one of the Souths most notorious racketeers The reason is because the mob boss has placed a huge bounty on Boss head and has hitmen all over Hazzard County who will stop at nothing to prevent him from testifying While Boss is in hiding Rosco takes over his little fat buddys administrative duties relishing the absolute authority that comes with the job

programme.title: Hercules 205
programme.desc: Hercules 205

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Following Boones confrontation with Hegel that left him severely injured he was eliminated by Zoor Beckett who was impregnated by Hegel gives birth to a boy who immediately grows up to a man He assumes the name Liam Kincaid and goes to Boones funeral where Quon would be eliminated by an alien replicant After impressing Daan he is made his new protector

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: To escape capture an alien merges with a pregnant woman This causes unexpected consequences for the aliens and for Blackwoods team - and violence for the hospital staff when the womanalien goes into labor

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcanes emerald-making machine threatens Columbias monopoly on the precious gems bringing him to the governments notice But his greed hides a deeper and more sinister agenda

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp thing finds some eggs in the swamp and this makes him start dreaming about when he was human and was in love

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A sinister woman called Zamara materializes on the base forcing Helena and Tony to accompany her to the planet of Vega whose natives are anything but friendly A servant of the Vegans known only as Number Eight informs the two Alphans that he and his race are the natural inhabitants of the planet and that Zamara and her race are androids who it turns out want the Alphans to teach them warfare

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The Fugitive

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As Heath settles into life in the Valley his authority is questioned by the men employed to aid him in a huge cattle drive which is further complicated by the arrival of a former general with plans of his own

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne becomes the trail boss for a widow and her disobedient crew to help drive her cattle but she is unaware the he is the one who killed her bushwhacking husband earlier

programme.desc: Briggs poses as an American tourist and subjects himself to a show trial in order to discredit a public prosecutor attempting to seize absolute power in his country

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working day watch and must go to the hospital when a veteran police officer and his young partner are seriously wounded in a liquor store holdup where they deal with very different reactions of the wives

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives investigate an especially creepy college freshman suspected of the sniper-rifle deaths of two people for no apparent reason other than the sport of killing

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: Godzilla Vs Mechagodzilla II
programme.desc: The United Nations assembles the ultimate weapon to defeat Godzilla while scientists discover a fresh pteranodon egg on a remote Japanese island

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: During World War II a top-secret Australian attack unit penetrates Japanese lines to perform a daring rescue mission to rescue the American crew of a crashed plane

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Tiger Warsaw
programme.desc: Chuck brought sorrow to his family when he shot his father who is now a semi-invalid After 15 years of self destruction he returns home to seek forgiveness

programme.title: The Presidents Man
programme.desc: A US presidents highly classified secret agent must find a fearless replacement to take over his extremely dangerous military missions
In a totalitarian future society Winston Smith whose daily work is re-writing history tries to rebel by falling in love

programme.title: 315 the Moment of Truth
programme.desc: The Cobras a vicious street gang rule an embattled high school with their violent brand of terror But theyre headed for a showdown when an ex-gang-member-gone-good challenges their brutal reign

programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Abdalla Ibrahim v. Joshua Quayhagen

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.desc: Hitomi Akano v. Keiko Tamai

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smeltzer's journey into MMA began 12 years ago, through Karate. Chris' work as a School Bus driver fits perfectly with his MMA lifestyle, allowing him the flexibility to train throughout the day, as well run a karate school for kids. The martial artist lifestyle helped bring structure to all areas of Chris' life. He believes he has become a better person through Martial Arts, and he makes the mental distinction between between being a fighter and being Martial Artist. He prefers the standup game feels he is progressing well to being an all around fighter with his BJJ Blue Belt.

programme.desc: HK Rising Stars - Craig Shintani NEW original

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
